metadata.thoughts:
**Determining strike status**

I need to format the JSON according to the schema. The document is in Italian and titled "Sciopero del trasporto pubblico, adesione personale Atac al 16,4%" published on 10/01/2025. It mentions a 16.4% attendance for the strike happening today. I’m trying to figure out if this is a new strike announcement, but it seems like it reports on an ongoing strike rather than an upcoming one. So, I won’t set isStrike to true.
